papers_mined.title: Songline (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Path across land/sky followed by creator-being; navigation via repeated song-words describing waypoints + landmarks + waterholes.

papers_mined.title: Pitjantjatjara (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Central Australian desert Aboriginal people; refer to selves as Anangu; tjukurpa = Dreaming law inseparable from creation ontology.

papers_mined.title: Long History Deep Time ANU Press
papers_mined.note: Tjukurpa taught + remembered through specific inma (songs/ritual dances) + rock art; natural hierarchy in songlines for age-appropriate curriculum.

papers_mined.title: Indigenous Youth Dreaming Songline Digital Learning SBS NITV
papers_mined.note: Children tracked Seven Sisters Songline across APY lands as ordered-sequence learning curriculum.

papers_mined.title: Waypoint-guided trajectory planning mobile robots GPT-4.1 (ScienceDirect)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: LLM as high-level planner suggesting intermediate waypoints; ML trajectory planner uses waypoints for feasible paths.

papers_mined.title: Scalable Strategies for Continual Learning with Replay (2025/05)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: standard CL with replay samples + consolidation reducing replay ratio + post-task training phase.

papers_mined.title: Contextual Experience Replay Continual Learning Language Agents ICLR 2025
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: experiences with dynamics + skills replayed in context window for continual learning of language agents.
